quotes.text: Music is the art of thinking with sounds.
The space between the notes is as important as the notes themselves.
Quiet the mind and the soul will speak.
Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
We are all just passing through. Our purpose here is to observe, to learn, to grow, to love — and then we return home.
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
A flower does not think of competing with the flower next to it. It just blooms.
